title: grewia humbertii
intro: Grewia humbertii is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the velvet leaf or velvet tree due to its distinctive velvety leaves. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Madagascar, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Grewia humbertii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. In terms of herbal preparations, Grewia humbertii is often used in the form of a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
